message: Jake
Fabar
The film crew has taken a corner of Central Park to shoot.
Hey, long time no see.
Hello, is the shoot going well?
Ugh
Hmm
I wonder.
Hey, you're back again.

The bright green of the new leaves is dazzling to the eyes. In this season, this place is perfect for a walk.
Are those people looking at the film crew with curiosity tourists?
Filming with the film crew every day is quite a challenge.
The director is watching the shoot in his usual laid-back style.
I really think he's a nice guy who never shows a grumpy face no matter when he comes, but there's a rumor that he's tough on the actual job.
I'm relieved to see he's looking a bit better.
I got a call from Gloria. Apparently, Cindy is recuperating from an illness.
That's too bad.
Was Cindy sick?
It seems they found something, but she’s really exhausted and needs to rest properly.
There are many issues, but somehow we should be able to finish filming.
It's tough for the director, isn't it?
Thinking it’s tough makes me feel tough. I try to think positively about everything now.
If the director slacks off, it sets a bad example.
Oh no, I can’t get too caught up in the conversation!
Is something wrong?
No, it’s about time Jennifer is ready. I don’t want to keep her waiting.
You seem to be having a hard time too, but hang in there.
How is Meryl doing afterward?
She's been incredibly volatile.
Could it be that the request has fallen through?
It was a tough situation, but we've gotten to the point of being half-clear.
Oh, I see! Then Meryl will be back in action soon.
If Meryl can make a comeback, the filming should progress smoothly. Alright, alright, it seems there's a light at the end of the tunnel.
Uh.
Yeah, I think the filming will somehow work out.
Yeah, probably.
Are you doing okay, director?
I’m fine, I’m fine, it’s not something for you to worry about.
From now on, I believe we can film smoothly and everything will go well.
Is Cindy off for a while?
Yeah. If she's sick, there's nothing we can do, right? Plus, I haven't heard from Guy, either.
That's true.
Well, just coming back to Gloria is good enough.
Still, Cindy's been through a lot, hasn't she?
Well, just between us, it seems Cindy was reportedly held captive by an obsessed fan.
Held captive!? Th-that's a terrible story.
Right? I hope she can recover safely.
I wonder if Cindy will still be usable after returning.
I was thinking of visiting Cindy, but Gloria refused.
Th-that's.
Sounds just like Gloria.
Right? But still, I mean, isn't it okay to at least visit her?
I doubt the director even thinks Cindy hasn’t returned to Gloria yet.
After all, this whole thing happened because Gloria wasn't paying enough attention.
Sigh.
Sigh, huh? But still, you lost to Gloria. That’s a shame.
She needs to be more careful from now on.
It would be a nightmare if something happened during shooting.
Have you heard anything from Guy?
Nope, nothing at all.
I see.
His filming will be okay once Cindy gets better, so there's no need to worry too much.
I get that you're feeling sorry about Guy. You guys are friends after all.
But I haven’t been able to help at all.
Hey, what good does it do for you to apologize for Guy? I’ll make sure to have a good talk with him later.
I wonder which will come back first, Guy or Cindy.
By the way, Gabriela seemed a bit down, didn’t she?
Is that so? She’s going through a tough time right now.
When you say tough time, is there something aside from Ginny?
Ah, no.
Well, you know, various things.
It seems there are a lot of problems in that line of work.
That might be true.
It’s not just ‘might be,’ it really is tough, you know.
She told me to be careful not to say unnecessary things.
By the way, did the Director know about Ginny?
Hmm, no.
I only know Gabriela.
Uh, well...
I hope that girl Ginny is alright.
Is Jennifer shooting alone?
Yeah, she has a scene where she’s alone in the park.
Jennifer.
Excuse me, Director, I’m sorry to interrupt your conversation.
Jennifer! Sorry, I was planning to head back.
Jennifer.
That’s not it. Meryl hasn’t shown up for the shoot at all. What’s going on?
Uh, um...
Meryl will probably be here starting tomorrow. Right, detective?
Huh? Oh, um, yeah.
Jennifer.
Director.
This situation is really troubling. I’m putting my all into this movie, but with Meryl...
I get your frustration, but just hang in there a little longer.
Jennifer
Director, it would be troublesome if your public and private lives became mixed.
Mixing public and private lives!? I have no such intention at all.
Jennifer
But I think it’s strange that Meryl hasn’t been charged given that we’re in this situation.
Well, however...
Jennifer
That’s not how it is!
It seems like it’s better for me to take my leave.
Ignoring the director's pleading gaze, I slipped away from the scene.
Do you recognize this ring?
No, I don’t know such a ring. What’s the deal with it?
No, this ring belonged to Ginny.
In that case, it’s even more something I wouldn’t know.
Come on, stop playing around.
No matter how many times you show it, I don’t know it.
I haven’t reported this to Meryl yet, but now that I know her daughter is Cindy, it’s only a matter of time before she comes back.
I want to report it to Meryl soon.
I think the filming has been a series of disasters, but I hope it can somehow be completed and released in theaters.
Let’s pray for the filming to proceed smoothly from now on.
Cindy shouldn't have returned to Gloria. If that's the case, Gloria is lying to the director.
Being held captive by a fanatic fan, huh? Are you saying that’s Tim?
I must go see Cindy. To get her to agree to meet her birth parent.
Looks like Gloria is managing to get by with a desperate strategy.
Still, if Cindy is sick, she might be angry if she hears that.
It's understandable that she won’t accept the director’s visit. After all, Cindy isn’t here.
It seems that Gloria is doing well thanks to her character.
It seems Guy hasn't been in touch with anyone.
I wonder where he is and what he's doing?
Aside from the contract renewal, who does he think he is to skip out on filming?
It’s likely the director has been under significant stress since the crank-in.
From now on, I hope the director can showcase his true abilities without any incidents.
I should get going. Sorry for butting in.
Come by again sometime.
*** This is a bug ***
